tasks.subject: Task 1: Remove the Snapshot feature
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Delete every Snapshot affordance (UI, command, wrapper, i18n keys, tests) while leaving the shared snapshot_current_* helpers create_profile depends on.

**Verify:** cargo test + npm test + npm run qa:i18n green.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src-tauri/src/profiles/mod.rs", "src-tauri/src/lib.rs", "src/hooks/useTauri.ts", "src/views/Profiles.tsx", "src/components/ModpackDetail.tsx", "src/i18n/locales/en.json", "src/i18n/locales/ru.json", "src/i18n/locales/zh-Hans.json", "src/i18n/locales/ar.json", "src-tauri/tests/qa_scenarios.rs"], "verifyCommand": "npm run qa:i18n && npm test && cd src-tauri && cargo test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No Snapshot UI anywhere", "snapshot_profile removed from backend + invoke_handler", "create_profile/wizard still work", "no snapshot* i18n keys; qa:i18n green", "npm test + cargo test green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: 'Start with all installed mods' wizard option
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a 4th Create-Modpack wizard strategy that pre-selects every installed mod (enabled + disabled) — the Snapshot replacement.

**Verify:** npx vitest run src/components/CreateModpackWizard.test.tsx && npm run qa:i18n.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/CreateModpackWizard.tsx", "src/components/CreateModpackWizard.test.tsx", "src/i18n/locales/en.json", "src/i18n/locales/ru.json", "src/i18n/locales/zh-Hans.json", "src/i18n/locales/ar.json"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/components/CreateModpackWizard.test.tsx && npm run qa:i18n", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Tile renders between fromActive and empty", "selects enabled AND disabled mods on step 2", "qa:i18n green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Dedupe Auto-detect in the Mod Library
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Auto-detect appears once in the Mod Library — keep the standalone button, drop the '+ Add mods' menu item, delete the dead includeAutoDetect prop.

**Verify:** npx vitest run src/views/Mods.test.tsx src/components/AddModsMenu.test.tsx.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/ModLibraryToolbar.tsx", "src/components/AddModsMenu.tsx", "src/views/Mods.test.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/views/Mods.test.tsx src/components/AddModsMenu.test.tsx", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Auto-detect appears once (standalone) in Mod Library", "includeAutoDetect prop removed from AddModsMenu", "npm test green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Fix share-code layout in non-English locales
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Keep the share code readable (no one-char-per-line wrap) by letting copy buttons wrap to their own row.

**Verify:** npx vitest run src/components/PublishModal.test.tsx.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/PublishModal.tsx", "src/styles.css", "src/components/PublishModal.test.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/components/PublishModal.test.tsx", "acceptanceCriteria": ["code on one line, copy buttons wrap", "no word-break:break-all on .gf-share-code-value", "npm test green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Out-of-sync detection — backend
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Record a published-content fingerprint in .share and expose out_of_sync via get_share_info.

**Verify:** cd src-tauri && cargo test sharing::.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src-tauri/src/sharing/mod.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cd src-tauri && cargo test sharing::", "acceptanceCriteria": ["published_signature persisted (serde default)", "out_of_sync on ShareResult (serde default)", "signature ignores timestamps/bundle, reacts to real edits", "get_share_info computes out_of_sync correctly incl None->false", "cargo test green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Out-of-sync detection — frontend
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Show an 'Out of sync — Re-share to push' banner in the modpack detail view when the shared pack has unpublished changes.

**Verify:** npx vitest run src/components/ModpackDetail.test.tsx && npm run qa:i18n.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/types.ts", "src/components/ModpackDetail.tsx", "src/components/ModpackDetail.test.tsx", "src/i18n/locales/en.json", "src/i18n/locales/ru.json", "src/i18n/locales/zh-Hans.json", "src/i18n/locales/ar.json"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/components/ModpackDetail.test.tsx && npm run qa:i18n", "acceptanceCriteria": ["banner + Re-share shown when out_of_sync true; calls onShare", "no banner when false/not shared", "npm test + qa:i18n green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: .sts2pack export/import — backend
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Tauri commands to export a modpack to a self-contained .sts2pack archive (manifest + bundled mod files) and import one back, reusing existing bundle/install functions.

**Verify:** cd src-tauri && cargo test export_import::.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src-tauri/src/export_import.rs", "src-tauri/src/lib.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cd src-tauri && cargo test export_import::", "acceptanceCriteria": ["export writes profile.json + per-mod zips", "import installs mods + creates matching profile, auto-suffix collisions, no .share/subscribe", "round-trip yields same mods+pack", "cargo test green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: .sts2pack export/import — frontend (takeover)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace clipboard 'Export JSON' and paste 'Import JSON' with file-based .sts2pack export (detail Advanced kebab) and import (Modpacks list page).

**Verify:** npx vitest run src/views/Profiles.test.tsx src/components/ModpackDetail.test.tsx && npm run qa:i18n.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/hooks/useTauri.ts", "src/components/ModpackDetail.tsx", "src/views/Profiles.tsx", "src/i18n/locales/en.json", "src/i18n/locales/ru.json", "src/i18n/locales/zh-Hans.json", "src/i18n/locales/ar.json", "src/i18n/locales/parity.test.ts", "src/views/Profiles.test.tsx", "src/components/ModpackDetail.test.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/views/Profiles.test.tsx src/components/ModpackDetail.test.tsx && npm run qa:i18n", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Export to file uses save() + exportProfileToFile", "Import from file uses open() + importSts2pack + refresh", "old JSON clipboard/paste UIs removed", "npm test + qa:i18n green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Cross-cutting verification & manual QA
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Confirm the whole branch is green and the visual fixes (items 1, 4) hold in light theme + RTL.

**Verify:** npm run qa:i18n && npm test && npm run build && cd src-tauri && cargo test; plus manual QA.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "npm run qa:i18n && npm test && npm run build && cd src-tauri && cargo test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npm test/qa:i18n/build green", "cargo test green", "manual: share-code layout ok en/ru/ar light+dark", "manual: out-of-sync banner + reshare", "manual: .sts2pack round-trip"]}
```
